{{CargoRelic
|name=Vessoul of Nethrone
|class_id=20276
|rank=Green
|affct=FAITH
|source=
|description=After being refined by Nethrone's soul power, the receptacle used to hold the Nethrone's mirror soul has the ability to capture people's souls. Once someone without a strong will obtains it, they will only be bewitched by the Nethrone's mirror soul; thus becoming Nethrone's doppelganger.
|fame=16
|art=16
|fth=30
|civ=15
|tech=13
|ss1=Per 10 Zombie Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HP +10
|ss2=Per 10 Zombie Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HP +20
|ss3=Per 10 Zombie Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HP +30
|ss4=Per 10 Zombie Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HP +30
|ss7=Per 10 Zombie Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HP +30<br> (Awakened)
}}
